title: When Was That Again
description: Adds timestamps to all chat messages
body:
Now for Forge 1.18!

Adds timestamps to all chat messages (including achievements, system, etc.)

[ ![Use promo code: "HorribleNerd" on BisectHosting for 25% off](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/990eac5d-2336-4a3d-b0e4-11f7bfc8b227.webp "https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/990eac5d-2336-4a3d-b0e4-11f7bfc8b227.webp")](https://bisecthosting.com/HorribleNerd "https://bisecthosting.com/HorribleNerd")

 

Check the config to customize the position, format or color. Also has an option to generate a different color per player, to allow for easier distinction between messages.

This mod is client-side only, so do not use it on the server-side.

I will not be supporting/creating this mod for older Minecraft versions or modloaders besides Forge.
